The completion block to be invoked with result when evaluation is complete. Result is YES if the url should be blocked, and NO if it isn’t.

Evaluates whether a URL should be blocked and if so, provides a UTF-8 encoded HTML representation of a blocking page.

# evaluateURL(_:completionHandler:) | Apple Developer Documentation

-  evaluateURL(_:completionHandler:) 

Instance Method# evaluateURL(_:completionHandler:)

iOS 26.2+iPadOS 26.2+

```
func evaluateURL(
    _ url: URL,
    completionHandler: @escaping (Bool, Data?) -> Void
)
```



```
func evaluateURL(_ url: URL) async -> (Bool, Data?)
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/BEWebContentFilter/evaluateURL(_:completionHandler:)#parameters)

`url`The URL to be evaluated.

`completionHandler`The completion block to be invoked with result when evaluation is complete. Result is YES if the url should be blocked, and NO if it isn’t.

## [Discussion](/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/BEWebContentFilter/evaluateURL(_:completionHandler:)#discussion)

Evaluates whether a URL should be blocked and if so, provides a UTF-8 encoded HTML representation of a blocking page.

This method performs a lazy initialization of some objects, so the first call could take longer than subsequent calls.
